summary: Practice Management CRUD and Document Sharing features fully tested. All 22 backend tests pass. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in document upload endpoint. Frontend UI verified with all tabs (Clients, Cases, Documents, Doc Generator) working correctly. Document sharing workflow operational.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/practice/clients/{id} - Get single client with related data (cases, documents, invoices)
✅ POST /api/practice/cases - Create case with client link
✅ GET /api/practice/cases/{id} - Get single case with documents, tasks, events, invoices, expenses
✅ POST /api/templates/generate with save_to_vault=true saves to vault with client_id/case_id
✅ POST /api/templates/generate includes X-Document-Id and X-Verification-Id headers
✅ Frontend: Clients tab shows client list with create/edit/delete buttons
✅ Frontend: Cases tab shows case list linked to clients with New Case button
✅ Frontend: Documents tab shows vault with 17 documents, search, folder filter, download/share/delete actions
✅ Frontend: Doc Generator has client/case dropdowns and save-to-vault toggle (enabled by default)
✅ Frontend: QR Verification Stamp and Digital Signature toggles present
✅ Frontend: Preview Document and Generate & Save buttons functional
updated_files: /app/backend/practice_management.py (fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization in document upload)
seed_data_creation: Test data with TEST_ prefix created and cleaned up during testing. Existing client 'Test Company Ltd' and case 'TEST_Case_e82578' remain for future testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Practice Management CRUD and Document Sharing features fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints in /app/backend/practice_management.py and /app/backend/document_templates.py. Frontend in /app/frontend/src/pages/PracticeManagementPage.jsx with DocumentGeneratorTab component (lines 1446-2160). Document sharing creates share links with tls.or.tz/shared/{token} format. Auto-save to vault feature is enabled by default in Doc Generator. All data-testid attributes are properly set for UI testing.

frontend_ui.cases_tab: PASS - Shows list linked to clients, new case button
frontend_ui.documents_tab: PASS - Shows vault with 17 docs, search, folders, actions
frontend_ui.doc_generator_tab: PASS - Client/case dropdowns, toggles, preview/generate buttons

bug_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in POST /api/practice/documents
bug_fixed.cause: After insert_one(), MongoDB adds _id field to document object which is not JSON serializable
bug_fixed.fix: Added document.pop('_id', None) after insert_one() in practice_management.py line 327
